textPlain: >I’ve worked on ads at Meta, Snap, and Nextdoor. I also consult companies on building ads. If you are building your ad stack, feel free to reach out — let’s chat!Hmmm

I almost always prefer text over video, but this video on the same subject is fantastic: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h7apO7q16V0. I watch it at least once every year.Also, the title of the blog post (and by extension this HN post) is IMO not really correct: it's not about the DFT but specifically about the FFT.
